title: prunella vulgaris var. japonica
intro: Prunella vulgaris var. japonica, also known as Japanese self-heal, is a variant of the self-heal plant (Prunella vulgaris) native to Japan and parts of East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Prunella vulgaris var. japonica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Prunella vulgaris var. japonica is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote overall well-being and support respiratory health.
